questionHtml: For an observer on the train, it is the tunnel that is moving and therefore will appear length contracted. This seems to contradict the observation made by the observer at rest to the tunnel, creating a paradox. Explain how this paradox is resolved. You may refer to your spacetime diagram in (b).
markschemeHtml:
ALTERNATIVE 1

indicates the two simultaneous events for t frame

marks on the diagram the different times «for both spacetime points» on the ct′ axis «shown as Δt′ on each diagram»

ALTERNATIVE 2: (no diagram reference)

the two events occur at different points in space

statement that the two events are not simultaneous in the t′ frame
